page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual server designed for parallel computing workloads. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 8369B processor featuring 48 dedicated physical cores operating at a base frequency of 2.9 GHz. The system is configured with 310 GB of RAM, providing approximately 6.46 GB of memory per core. Acceleration is delivered via a single NVIDIA A10 GPU based on the Ampere architecture, which includes 24 GB of dedicated VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, requiring external storage volumes, and operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps under the KVM hypervisor.

In benchmark evaluations, this instance demonstrates top-tier performance in large language model inference. Specifically, prompt processing and text generation speeds for both small (135M) and medium (7B) models rank in the top 10% of tested configurations. The platform also exhibits strong performance in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, image processing, and CPU encryption tests, placing in the top 25%. Standard integer, floating-point, and memory bandwidth benchmarks generally align with the average tier for this hardware class.

From a resource allocation perspective, the instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that require dedicated GPU acceleration paired with substantial host memory, without the overhead of local NVMe storage. The hardware configuration is optimized for machine learning inference, image processing, cryptographic operations, and multi-threaded data decompression.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 48 dedicated physical cores and 310 GB of RAM. It features a single NVIDIA A10 GPU with 24 GB of VRAM, making it highly capable for parallel processing tasks. While it lacks local storage, it provides a 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data highlights top-tier performance in large language model inference for small and medium models, alongside strong capabilities in image processing and multi-threaded decompression. This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for specialized workloads that require dedicated GPU acceleration and substantial host memory without the need for high-speed local NVMe drives. It is well-suited for machine learning inference, image processing, and cryptographic workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 48 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 310 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA A10 GPU with 24 GB VRAM, optimized for AI inference and image processing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 48 Intel Xeon cores, 310 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA A10 GPU for AI inference.
tagline: A dedicated GPU-accelerated instance featuring Ampere architecture and high-capacity host memory for optimized machine learning inference and parallel processing workloads.
bullet_points: Equipped with 1x NVIDIA A10 GPU featuring 24 GB of Ampere VRAM.
Powered by 48 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores at 2.9 GHz.
Includes 310 GB of system memory and 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
Delivers top-tier benchmark performance in small and medium LLM inference.
Designed for machine learning inference, image processing, and cryptography.
